behavior_summary: Provides NPC Orlok's interactive behaviors: handling player 'U8P_ORLOK::look' (examine) to emit an appropriate short description, managing fast-area enter/exit setup and teardown, running idle/background behavior, reacting to assaults by calling guards and shouting, and driving conversation startup/selection.
ORLOK::look selects a one-line description based on Orlok's life state (dead/alive) and two global flags (orlokName, orlokJob) and makes Orlok 'bark' that string to the player.
U8P_ORLOK::enterFastArea resets stored references, configures processing exclusion, and spawns the background idle routine U8P_ORLOK::02DC.
U8P_ORLOK::leaveFastArea clears references and, if Orlok is alive, teleports him to a random x/y coordinate.
U8P_ORLOK::cast monitors if Orlok has a target/assailant, waits/delays while checking conditions, and when appropriate spawns guard behavior and has Orlok shout for help.

U8P_ORLOK::02DC is a looping idle/background script that picks randomized actions and animations, uses Orlok's position to vary behavior, and may spawn the conversation entry U8P_ORLOK::049C when nobody is talking.
U8P_ORLOK::049C (conversation entry) chooses dialog branches using a random roll and the orlokMet flag, orients Orlok toward the player, and sequences speech with delays.
notable_control_flow: ORLOK::look: Branches first on Npc::isDead -> if dead use the 'body' description; else evaluate global flags orlokName and orlokJob (combined and individually) to choose one of several short descriptions before calling Item::bark.
U8P_ORLOK::enterFastArea -> clears multiple reference slots (resetRef / FREE::2A56) then spawns U8P_ORLOK::02DC to run idle logic.
U8P_ORLOK::leaveFastArea -> clears the same references; if Npc::isDead indicates Orlok is alive, generate two urandom values and Npc::teleport Orlok to those coordinates.

U8P_ORLOK::cast -> polls Npc::getTarget into a local, waits/delays (via FREE::1C19) possibly in a loop, and when attacker conditions are satisfied spawns CALGUARD::0080, re-checks life state, clears refs, and uses Item::bark to shout.

U8P_ORLOK::02DC -> repeats a delay, picks a random index (urandom) to select among movement/animation METHOD spawns; also reads Orlok X coordinate to choose alternate behaviors and may spawn the conversation entry if somebodyTalking is false.
open_questions: Exact mapping of orlokName/orlokJob flag bit meanings to the individual strings (which flag combinations map precisely to 'Orlok the barkeep' vs 'Orlok' vs 'barkeep' vs 'man') is inferred but not definitively named.
Precise semantics and side-effects of the various FREE::* helpers (e.g., FREE::2A56, FREE::1C19, FREE::1D62) are inferred (cleanup/delay/random helper) but not fully known.
Detailed parameters and animation semantics for METHOD::091C and METHOD::15E7 (what numeric args represent) are not documented here.
Exact dialogue texts and full branching logic inside U8P_ORLOK::049C (conversation) are only partially reconstructed from references and random-branch patterns.

main_function.name: U8P_ORLOK::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to a player examining Orlok by choosing and emitting a brief descriptive bark string. Uses Orlok life state and global flags to pick the most appropriate one-line description.
entry_conditions: Event 0: the player (or viewing process) looks at/examines the Orlok NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::look
function_map.role: Handle 'U8P_ORLOK::look' (examine) event: decide description based on Npc::isDead and global flags and call Item::bark to speak.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler: configure process exclude, clear stored references, and spawn idle/background routine U8P_ORLOK::02DC.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit handler: clear references and teleport Orlok to a random location if alive.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::cast
function_map.role: React to being targeted/attacked: poll for attacker, delay/retry, spawn guard behavior and shout for help when appropriate.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::02DC
function_map.role: Idle/background behavior: periodic delays, random action selection, position-based animation branches, and possible conversation spawn.

function_map.name: U8P_ORLOK::049C
function_map.role: Conversation entry/routine: selects dialog lines using random roll and orlokMet, orients Orlok to player, sequences lines with delays.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the idle/background behavior that runs Orlok's periodic animations and conversation checks.
May spawn the conversation entry routine when random conditions and somebodyTalking indicate it's OK to start dialog.

external_calls.purpose: Check whether Orlok is dead to select a corpse description instead of alive descriptions.
Have Orlok speak the chosen short description to the examining player.
Clear per-NPC reference slots used for tracking players/items when entering the fast area.
Utility cleanup calls to free/reset referenced resources during fast-area setup.
Clear/free stored references when leaving the fast area.
Teleport Orlok to random coordinates generated by urandom when exiting the fast area while alive.
Generate random X and Y coordinates for teleport destination.
Obtain Orlok's current combat/interaction target to detect attackers.
Spawned as a delay/timer between target checks or as part of a wait loop.
Spawn guard/defense behavior in response to assault detection.
Make Orlok shout for help (e.g., 'Beren! I am assaulted!') after guards are called.
Read Orlok's X coordinate to choose different behavior branches based on position thresholds.
Spawned to perform facing/movement/animation actions selected by random branch.
Another method spawn used to apply facing/animation with timing, often after querying Npc::getDir.
Get current facing to drive subsequent METHOD spawns.

reads.name: orlokName
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether Orlok's proper name should be used in the 'U8P_ORLOK::look' description (affects choice between 'Orlok' vs generic terms).

reads.name: orlokJob
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether Orlok's job/title ('barkeep') should be included in the 'U8P_ORLOK::look' description, and combined with orlokName to choose a full 'Orlok the barkeep' string.

reads.name: orlokMet
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the player has met Orlok before; affects conversation selection in U8P_ORLOK::049C (first-time vs repeat greetings).

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Prevents U8P_ORLOK::02DC from starting conversation behavior when another dialog is active.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides NPC Orlok's interactive behaviors: handling player 'U8P_ORLOK::look' (examine) to emit an appropriate short description, managing fast-area enter/exit setup and teardown, running idle/background behavior, reacting to assaults by calling guards and shouting, and driving conversation startup/selection.
